executive_summary: The instructor demonstrates strong room presence and engagement, effectively using open-palm gestures. Opportunities exist to refine gesture size for emphasis and to ensure quicker re-orientation towards the audience after board or note checks.

top_strengths.title: Open-palm explanatory delivery
top_strengths.evidence: 00:45-01:00 included open-palm explanatory gestures that supported the explanation.
top_strengths.what_to_repeat: Keep the same open-palm gesture shape when emphasizing key ideas.

top_strengths.title: Alert room presence
top_strengths.evidence: 00:00-00:15 kept the head and eyes visibly engaged with the room. 00:15-00:30 kept the head and eyes visibly engaged with the room.
top_strengths.what_to_repeat: Keep the same quick room checks that make the lecture feel attentive.

top_strengths.title: Distributed room engagement
top_strengths.evidence: 00:00-00:15 showed attention moving across more than one part of the room. 00:30-00:45 showed attention moving across more than one part of the room.
top_strengths.what_to_repeat: Reuse the left-center-right room sweep that already looks natural.

strength_inventory.title: Upright confident presence
strength_inventory.evidence: 00:45-01:00 held an upright, settled stance rather than a collapsed or guarded one.
strength_inventory.what_to_repeat: Keep the same upright, settled stance between points and transitions.

priority_actions.title: Tighten the peak size of gestures
priority_actions.why_it_matters: Large bursts of motion can distract from the teaching point when they are not tightly timed.
priority_actions.what_we_saw: 00:00-00:15 had gesture peaks that looked larger than the teaching point required. 00:15-00:30 had gesture peaks that looked larger than the teaching point required.
priority_actions.what_to_try_next: Keep big gestures for true emphasis and use smaller controlled hand movements elsewhere.

low_confidence_watchlist.title: Turn back toward the audience sooner
low_confidence_watchlist.why_watch: The signal is visible, but it is not yet sustained enough to justify real corrective feedback.
low_confidence_watchlist.what_we_saw: 00:15-00:30 spent longer than needed turned away from the audience after checks.
low_confidence_watchlist.what_to_monitor_next: Check whether board or note checks end with a quick shoulder-and-chin reset back to the room.

keep_doing: Keep the same open-palm gesture shape when emphasizing key ideas.
Keep the same quick room checks that make the lecture feel attentive.
Reuse the left-center-right room sweep that already looks natural.
Keep the same upright, settled stance between points and transitions.
watch_for: Check whether gesture size matches the importance of the point instead of peaking on routine lines.
Check whether board or note checks end with a quick shoulder-and-chin reset back to the room.
confidence_notes: Tracking quality is stable enough for formative review, but the outputs remain heuristic proxies rather than direct teaching-quality measures.

evidence_moments.coaching_implication: Keep big gestures for true emphasis and use smaller controlled hand movements elsewhere.
